hooks.command: echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'detached'). Recent: $(git log --oneline -3 2>/dev/null || echo 'no commits')"

echo 'Post-compaction reminder: ESM-only TypeScript project (.js import extensions). Use devbox — do not install on host. Makefile (dev.mk) is primary dev interface. Run make -f dev.mk check before finishing.'
sh -c 'command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; FILE=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx) npx eslint --no-warn-ignored "$FILE" 2>&1 | head -20 || true ;; esac'
sh -c 'command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; FILE=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx) npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20 ;; esac; exit 0'

sh -c 'echo "State before compaction:"; echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)"; echo "Modified files: $(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | tr "\n" ", ")"; echo "Staged files: $(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | tr "\n" ", ")"'

sh -c 'INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | jq -e .stop_hook_active >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ "$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .stop_hook_active)" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi; [ -z "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" ] && exit 0; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" || exit 0; [ -f package.json ] || exit 0; command -v devbox >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; OUTPUT=$(make -f dev.mk check 2>&1); rc=$?; printf "%s\n" "$OUTPUT" | tail -30; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then exit 2; fi'
